CREATE TABLE time_zone_test (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE);
SELECT id, event_time, current_localtime() AS local_time FROM time_zone_test;
SELECT id, event_time - current_localtime() AS time_difference FROM time_zone_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, current_localtime() FROM time_zone_test WHERE event_time > current_localtime();
SELECT id, current_localtime() as local_current_time FROM time_zone_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM time_zone_test WHERE id != 2);
CREATE TABLE events AS SELECT id, event_time, current_localtime() AS local_time FROM time_zone_test;
SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (event_time - current_localtime()))) AS average_time_difference FROM events;
SELECT id, current_localtime(), COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY id) AS event_count FROM time_zone_test;
WITH time_diff AS (SELECT id, event_time, current_localtime() AS local_time FROM time_zone_test) SELECT id, (local_time - event_time) AS local_event_difference FROM time_diff;
